channel.title: contosec
channel.description: A working journal on cybersecurity. Practitioner notes on Microsoft Entra, AI agents, and Defender.

item.title: Closing the Desktop AI Gap with Global Secure Access
item.description: Prompt injection visibility for Claude Desktop and other native AI apps, using Microsoft Entra Global Secure Access Internet Access. A lab-validated walkthrough by Carlos Suarez.

item.title: Microsoft Agent 365: How It Fits Into Your Operating Model
item.description: A walkthrough of the Microsoft Agent 365 lifecycle showing who owns what at every step: Builder, AI/IT Admin, Security Admin, and Compliance.

item.title: Microsoft Entra Agent ID: How Identity Works for AI Agents
item.description: An interactive visual reference for Microsoft Entra Agent ID: the hierarchical identity model and authentication flows that power AI agents in Microsoft Entra ID.

item.title: RedTide: Automated Attack Simulations for Endpoint Security Validation
item.description: An open-source PowerShell toolkit that automates 13 attack simulations for endpoint security validation. No malware, real alerts, full cleanup.

item.title: Bringing Microsoft Defender Attack Simulation Data to Power BI
item.description: An open-source Azure pipeline that brings Microsoft Defender for Office 365 attack simulation data into Power BI for custom reporting and analytics.
